QTE ENABLE.description: Enable or disable the QTE (Quick Time Event) system.

SP Gain Base (0% MB).description: SP gain for A/D buttons at 0% MindBroken (0.001-1.0, ~1.6% SP per press).

SP Gain Min (100% MB).description: SP gain for A/D buttons at 100% MindBroken (0.001-0.5, ~0.2% SP per press).

Yellow Button SP Gain Min.description: Minimum SP gain for yellow button presses.

Yellow Button SP Gain Max.description: Maximum SP gain for yellow button presses.

MP Penalty Percent.description: MP penalty percentage when failing QTE (0.1-1.0, 30% = lose 30% of max MP).

MindBroken Penalty Percent.description: MindBroken penalty percentage when failing QTE.

Red Button MB Penalty.description: MindBroken penalty for red button presses.

SP Penalty Multiplier.description: Multiplier for SP penalty when failing QTE.

Window Duration Min.description: Minimum duration for QTE window in seconds.

Window Duration Max.description: Maximum duration for QTE window in seconds.

Cooldown Duration Min.description: Minimum cooldown duration between QTE windows in seconds.

Cooldown Duration Max.description: Maximum cooldown duration between QTE windows in seconds.

Rotation Speed.description: Rotation speed of QTE buttons in degrees per second.

Rotation Start Time.description: Time delay before rotation starts in seconds.

Color Change Interval.description: Interval between color changes in seconds.

Press Indicator Duration.description: Duration of press indicator animation in seconds.

Max Button Transparency.description: Maximum transparency of QTE buttons (0.0 = opaque, 1.0 = transparent).

Max Pink Shadow Intensity.description: Maximum intensity of pink shadow effect.

Combo Milestone.description: Number of successful QTE presses needed for combo milestone.
